updates.note: In the first cabinet meeting, CM Suvendu Adhikari announced the "Annapurna Bhandaar" scheme to replace Lakshmir Bhandar, providing ₹3,000 per month to eligible women starting June 1, 2026. No official gazette notification published yet — tracking cabinet statement only. ↗ Times of India · May 2026 ↗ Anandabazar Patrika · May 12, 2026
